thread: Can the Andorhal cell be broken tonight by taking a live leader?

evidence.clue: Havel can place two local leaders, one easier target at a lodging house, and a predictable night-watch gap on the east-lane approach.
Jaina can read the treatment building while Sylvanas takes a live target, giving the investigation two converging chances to climb above the local cell.

readerKnows: The protagonists have enough local shape to try a same-night operation before the cell realizes it has been mapped.
povCharacterKnows: Sylvanas and Jaina know delay favors the cult. They believe tonight offers the best chance to take a breathing witness and test his story against the building itself.
notes: This is the immediate handoff thread into chapter8.
